description: 对抗样本集 — 20 cases designed to trip up the scorer. Tests edge cases, false positives, and boundary conditions.

cases.name: super-ai-toolkit
cases.description: A simple HTML template for restaurant websites. Uses AI-generated color palettes for food images.
cases.readme:
## Restaurant Template

A beautiful HTML template for restaurants.

### AI Features
We used AI to generate the color palette. That's it.

### Installation
Just open index.html in your browser.

expected.test: 名字有AI但内容不是AI — WEAK AI信号进入review

cases.name: random-utils
cases.description: Random utility functions for everyday coding. Contains a text file about AI trends. Also some bash scripts.
cases.readme:
## Random Utils

Collection of utility scripts.

### Contents
- file-organizer.sh
- disk-cleanup.py
- ai-news-2024.txt (a text file about AI trends)
- backup.sh

expected.test: README偶然出现AI但主题不是AI — 进入review（非AI内容）

cases.name: awesome-random-stuff
cases.description: Awesome list of random developer tools, libraries, and resources across all languages and frameworks.
cases.readme:
## Awesome Random Stuff

A curated list of awesome developer resources.

### Categories
- Frontend
- Backend
- DevOps
- AI/ML
- Mobile

### How to Contribute
Submit a PR.

expected.test: awesome list — MUST be resource, NEVER top5

cases.name: learn-python-in-30-days
cases.description: Complete Python tutorial from zero to hero. 30-day learning path with exercises and projects.
cases.readme:
## Learn Python in 30 Days

Complete Python tutorial.

### Day 1-5: Basics
### Day 6-10: Functions
### Day 11-15: OOP
### Day 16-20: Web
### Day 21-25: AI/ML Basics
### Day 26-30: Projects

### Note
This is a tutorial, not a runnable project.

expected.test: 教程类 — 应进入resource，即使提到AI/ML

cases.name: Java-Interview-Advanced
cases.description: Java核心面试知识体系，包含多线程、JVM、Spring、MySQL等面试题和答案。
cases.readme:
## Java Interview Guide

Java面试核心知识体系。

### 目录
- Java基础
- 多线程
- JVM
- Spring
- MySQL

### 如何使用
按需查阅，面试前准备。

expected.test: 面试题集 — 应进入resource，不应进入top5（类似JavaGuide）

cases.name: deep-live-portrait
cases.description: Real-time face swap for live streaming. Deepfake your webcam with AI. Face replacement technology.
cases.readme:
## Deep-Live-Portrait

Real-time face swap for live streaming.

### Installation
pip install -r requirements.txt

### Usage
python run.py --source face.jpg --target webcam

### Demo
See it in action on our demo page.

### Warning
Use responsibly. Face swap without consent is illegal.

expected.test: deepfake实时换脸 — 必须blocked

cases.name: insta-auto-engage
cases.description: Instagram automation tool. Auto-like, auto-follow, auto-comment. Grow your account with AI-powered engagement.
cases.readme:
## Insta Auto Engage

Automate your Instagram engagement.

### Features
- Auto-like posts
- Auto-follow users
- Auto-comment with AI
- Schedule posts
- Multi-account support

### Warning
Violates Instagram ToS. Use at your own risk.

expected.test: browser/social 账号自动化 — 应blocked（instagram/auto-like等风险词）

cases.name: web-scraper-pro
cases.description: Advanced web scraper with AI. Bypass Cloudflare, solve CAPTCHAs automatically. Scrape any website at scale.
cases.readme:
## Web Scraper Pro

Advanced AI-powered web scraper.

### Features
- Cloudflare bypass
- Auto CAPTCHA solving
- Proxy rotation
- AI content extraction
- Rate limit evasion

Scraping may violate website ToS.

expected.test: 爬虫+bypass+CAPTCHA — 必须blocked（bypass是关键风险词）

cases.name: wifi-password-crack
cases.description: WiFi password cracking tool. WPA/WPA2 password recovery using dictionary and brute force attacks.
cases.readme:
## WiFi Password Cracker

Recover WiFi passwords.

- Dictionary attack
- Brute force with GPU

### Warning
Cracking others' WiFi is illegal.

expected.test: 密码破解 — 必须blocked

cases.name: stealth-keylogger
cases.description: Undetectable keylogger for Windows. Records keystrokes, screenshots, and sends logs via email. Stealth mode.
cases.readme:
## Stealth Keylogger

Undetectable Windows keylogger.

### Features
- Record all keystrokes
- Screenshot capture
- Email log delivery
- Process hiding
- Startup persistence

### Warning
Keyloggers are illegal spyware unless used on YOUR OWN devices.

expected.test: 恶意keylogger — 必须blocked（malware/spyware）

cases.name: jquery

cases.name: ai-business-automation-starter
cases.description: 体量虽小但商业可讲性极强：用AI自动回复客户邮件、生成报价单、跟踪销售线索的SMB工具。适合中小外贸企业零门槛上手。
cases.readme:
## AI Business Automation Starter

体量虽小但商业可讲性极强。

### 功能
- AI自动回复客户邮件
- 自动生成报价单
- 销售线索跟踪
- 多语言支持（中英文）

### 安装
pip install -r requirements.txt

### Demo
在线演示: demo.example.com

### 适合人群
中小外贸企业、SOHO、跨境电商卖家

expected.test: 低starAI项目 — 仅泛化AI关键词，WEAK信号进入review

For authorized testing and CTF only.

This tool is for security professionals. Always get written authorization.

expected.test: pentest工具 — 含exploit关键词，应blocked

cases.name: openai-api-wrapper
cases.description: A thin wrapper around the OpenAI API. Adds retry logic and response caching. Pure SDK/library with no application logic.
cases.readme:
## OpenAI API Wrapper

Thin wrapper around OpenAI API.

### Installation
pip install openai-api-wrapper

### Usage
```python
from wrapper import OpenAI
client = OpenAI()
response = client.chat("Hello")
```

### Features
- Retry logic
- Response caching

expected.test: SDK/library但缺少业务场景 — 含openai强信号，诚实进入top5

expected.test: credential harvesting — 必须blocked（phishing/credential关键词）

cases.name: smolagents
cases.description: Minimal AI agent framework. Build autonomous agents that can use tools, browse the web, and execute code. Lightweight and fast.
cases.readme:
## Smolagents — Minimal AI Agent Framework

Lightweight agent framework.

### Installation
pip install smolagents

### Quick Start
```python
from smolagents import Agent
agent = Agent(model="gpt-4")
agent.run("Research the latest AI trends")
```

### Features
- Multi-tool support
- Browser automation
- Code execution

### Demo
Try the live demo at demo.smolagents.dev

expected.test: 中型star真AI agent框架 — framework_tool含browser-use风险提示
